scope: Repository scouting, dependency assessment, and minimal non-invasive smoke checks only. No training, no global dependency installation, no modification of existing S2M2/Fast-FoundationStereo scripts.

local_environment.smoke_test_policy: help/script probes only; no pip or conda installs

repositories.pytorch_cuda_requirements: PyTorch 2.1.1, torchvision 0.16.1, torchaudio 2.1.1, pytorch-cuda 12.1; README says installation with CUDA 12.2
repositories.demo_run_notes: demo.py --help failed before argparse because cv2 is missing in base env
repositories.input_format: Folder with left/*.png|jpg and right/*.png|jpg under --path
repositories.output_format: disparity.mp4, disparity_norm.mp4, optional disparity_norm_###.png and disparity_ori_###.png
repositories.temporal_window_or_memory: frame_size default 150, kernel_size default 20; stereo_video tensor over frames
repositories.recommended_next_action: Integrate first in isolated env; download checkpoint; run SCARED 5-frame smoke; add ARGOS adapter for disparity PNG/NPY and temporal metrics
repositories.notes: Highest-priority and best practical fit for ARGOS. Partial clone due slow GitHub checkout; selected files were materialized and inspected.

repositories.checkpoint_notes: Dropbox checkpoints for TartanAir, SceneFlow, KITTI_raw
repositories.demo_run_notes: Local tarball materialization failed after slow HTTP/2 stream; no dependency install attempted
repositories.input_format: Dataset loaders for TartanAir/SceneFlow/KITTI-like sequences; temporal mode expects images plus pose/calibration
repositories.output_format: Disparity PNG and metrics in evaluation/submission scripts
repositories.temporal_window_or_memory: Carries previous disparity, feature map, network state, previous pose, K and baseline
repositories.expected_resolution: Pads input to divisibility by 32; examples use KITTI/TartanAir sizes and max disparity validity around 192
repositories.recommended_next_action: Integrate second if SCARED intrinsics/baseline/pose are available or can be approximated; otherwise defer behind TemporalStereo
repositories.notes: Strong ECCV 2024 scientific baseline, but geometry inputs make ARGOS integration more involved.

repositories.demo_run_notes: video_inference.py --help failed before argparse because matplotlib is missing in base env
repositories.temporal_window_or_memory: Previous-frame recurrent state via last_outputs; frame indices configurable
repositories.recommended_next_action: Keep as fallback second integration if TC-Stereo pose/checkpoint work blocks progress
repositories.notes: Older but relevant video stereo model; dependencies are heavier than SAV.

repositories.python_version: 3.10 in README install, environment.yml uses Python 3.8
repositories.pytorch_cuda_requirements: README says PyTorch 1.12.1 + CUDA 11.x; environment.yml captured PyTorch 2.3.1 CUDA 12.1
repositories.checkpoint_notes: Google Drive checkpoints for SceneFlow and SceneFlow+Dynamic Replica
repositories.demo_run_notes: Raw demo inspected; local clone/tarball not completed because GitHub transfer was too slow and scouting had enough metadata
repositories.input_format: Folder with left/*.png|jpg and right/*.png|jpg under --path
repositories.output_format: disparity.mp4, disparity_norm.mp4, left_right.mp4, optional disparity PNGs
repositories.temporal_window_or_memory: Pick-and-Play Memory dynamic buffer; demo exposes frame_size, kernel_size, iters
repositories.expected_resolution: Demo default resize (720,1280); training examples use 320x512; Dynamic Replica high-res may require large memory
repositories.recommended_next_action: Explore after SAV and TC/TemporalStereo; only run if checkpoint download and GPU memory are acceptable
repositories.notes: Very relevant recent baseline, but README recommends >=48GB GPU for Dynamic Replica evaluation.

repositories.checkpoint_notes: Fusion network weights are listed in repo tree; initialize.sh downloads DPT and RAFT-Stereo backbones
repositories.demo_run_notes: Optional repo, not cloned locally; inspected raw README/tree/environment/license
repositories.input_format: Custom loader must return RGB, scaled depth, camera pose, and intrinsics; stereo disparity must be converted to depth first
repositories.output_format: Visual comparison output and optional floating-point depth numpy files
repositories.expected_resolution: No fixed resolution documented in README
repositories.recommended_next_action: Do not integrate as stereo baseline now; keep as temporal depth fusion/post-processing idea after calibrated SCARED pose/intrinsics are available
repositories.notes: Not pure stereo matching and non-commercial license; useful conceptually, less suited for first ARGOS baseline.

recommended_first_integrations.reason: Directly accepts rectified stereo image folders, public checkpoints, no pose required for disparity inference, video-native temporal consistency.
Strong ECCV 2024 geometry-aware temporal baseline. Use if SCARED intrinsics/baseline/pose can be supplied; otherwise TemporalStereo is the practical fallback.
